zh.Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay, Bri: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可辛加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Welles於1579年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Henry St John34歲，母親Jane Neale30歲。她於大約1600年與George Anthony Stoddard在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1661年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Welles于1579年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Henry St John34岁，母亲Jane Neale30岁。她于大约1600年与George Anthony Stoddard在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1661年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Welles was born in 1579, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry St John, was 34 and her mother, Jane Neale, was 30. She married George Anthony Stoddard about 1600, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 1661.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Welles(이)가 1579년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry St John(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Neale(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1600년 영국에서 George Anthony Stoddard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1661년 이후 사망했다.

Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Anthony Stoddard около 1600 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после 1661 г.
